title: tecoma fulva
intro: Tecoma fulva, also known as Yellow Trumpetbush or Yellow Bell, is a flowering shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and reduce fever. The plant is also valued for its health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, and promoting a good night's sleep. Tecoma fulva can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
